items.title: July 13, 1986: Arvydas Sabonis runs the floor for a slam during the Soviet Union's 105-93 win over Greece in the semifinal round of the FIBA World Championship.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 13, 1986: Arvydas Sabonis runs the floor for a slam during the Soviet Union's 105-93 win over Greece in the semifinal round of the FIBA World Championship.

Sabonis, who'd recently been selected as the 24th pick in the 1986 NBA Draft (Portland Trail Blazers), scored 17 PTS.

items.title: In the 3 times Paul George has been traded, his teams got back: Jaylen Brown, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Domantas Sabonis, Victor Oladipo, Danilo Gallinari, 6 first round picks, 2 second rd. picks, and 2 pick swaps
items.author: ASS_BASHER
items.body_excerpt: Paul George is the greatest modern day NBA dynasty builder, helping OKC win a championship, helping the Pacers return to relevance, and giving the Sixers the best chance they have of winning the title now. What a great guy and a great person.
